case_title: MASONEK, EVE H. VS WEST VALLEY CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $924.25 FILED BY MASONEK, EVE H. AS TO DEFENDANT WEST VALLEY CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEST VALLEY CONSTRUCTION INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASONEK, EVE H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST VALLEY CONSTRUCTION INC. $870.71 PRINCIPAL, $54.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $924.71, $967.46 LESS 10% CONTIBUTORY NEGLIGENCE, NET JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WEST VALLEY CONSTRUCTION INC.
